inputs.label: Coefficient a
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of x in the linear Diophantine equation ax + by = c

inputs.label: Coefficient b
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of y in the linear Diophantine equation ax + by = c

inputs.label: Constant c
inputs.businessContext: Right-hand side constant of the equation ax + by = c

inputs.label: Initial x (particular solution)
inputs.businessContext: A particular integer solution for x, used to generate general solution

inputs.label: Initial y (particular solution)
inputs.businessContext: A particular integer solution for y, used to generate general solution

inputs.label: Parameter k
inputs.businessContext: Integer parameter to generate infinite family of solutions

outputs.primary: General solution: x = x0 + (b/g)*k, y = y0 - (a/g)*k
breakdown: General solution: x = x0 + (b/g)*k, y = y0 - (a/g)*k
